response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows), but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows ~13-14 years of professional experience, no advanced degree, no demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, no cloud/AI strategy leadership, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving org-wide technical strategy. The gap between Senior IC and Principal/Director-level AI strategist is substantial.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and developer tooling
Track record of founding open-source platforms (GISCollective) and community teaching/workshops
concerns: No Master's/PhD in AI and no recognized AI products or platforms at scale
Lacks Principal/Director-level scope — no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI strategy
Experience is closer to ~13 years and weighted toward IC delivery, not technical innovation leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Seniority gap — Senior IC vs. Director-level Principal
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
